mnemonics: Definition is the foundation, Proof is the explanation
Theorems stand on axioms, Proofs are the reasoning
keyPoints: Definition: A statement that defines a term or concept in a specific context
Proof: A series of logical steps to establish the validity of a statement or theorem
Axiom: A self-evident truth used as a foundation for a proof
Theorem: A statement that has been proven to be true using logical reasoning
